zh.Heaton, Metropolitan borough of Dean, La: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾希頓
zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Huyton於1300年出生在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什。她於大約1318年與John de Heaton II在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1335年11月在她的家鄉享年35歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什。

zh-hans.Heaton, Metropolitan borough of Dean, La: 英国英格兰藍卡爾希頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret Huyton于1300年出生在英国藍卡爾斯坦迪什。她于大约1318年与John de Heaton II在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1335年11月在她的家乡享年35岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾斯坦迪什。

nameMeanings.name: Huyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Huyton (Lancs), Hyton in Bootle (Cumb), or, less likely, Huyton in Blackrod (Lancs).

variants.name: Highton
meanings: English: (i) locative name from Heighton Street in West Firle or South Heighton (both in Sussex). (ii) perhaps a variant of   Huyton  , as the name of Huyton in Blackrod (Lancs) is also recorded as Highton; see   Lancs Place-Names  , p. 45.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Huyton was born in 1300, in Standish, Lancashire, England. She married John de Heaton II about 1318, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in November 1335, in her hometown, at the age of 35, and was buried in Standish, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret Huyton est née en 1300, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé John de Heaton II environ 1318, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en novembre 1335, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret Huyton wurde 1300 in Standish, Lancashire, England geboren. Sie hat um 1318 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom John de Heaton II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im November 1335 im Alter von 35 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Standish, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret Huyton è nata il nel 1300 nel Standish, Lancashire, England. Lei sposato John de Heaton II circa 1318, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel novembre 1335, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolta a Standish, Lancashire, England.

ja.Of,, Lancashire, England: イギリスイギリスランカシュアイア
ja.Heaton, Metropolitan borough of Dean, La: イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアヒートン
ja.Standish, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュ
ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Huytonは1300年にイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュで生まれた。約1318年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでJohn de Heaton IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1335年11月に故郷で35歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Huyton(은)는 1300년 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1318년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 John de Heaton II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1335년 11월 그녀의 고향에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에 묻혔다.

mn.Heaton, Metropolitan borough of Dean, La: Heaton, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret Huyton nasceu em 1300, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com John de Heaton II aproximadamente 1318, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em novembro de 1335, em sua cidade natal, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Huyton родилась в 1300 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Heaton II около 1318 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла ноябрь 1335 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret Huyton nació en 1300, en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Se casó con John de Heaton II aproximadamente 1318, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en noviembre de 1335, en su pueblo, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultada en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
